subject: Hit, Universe 6 assassin, standing in a guarded stance with arms raised
description: A stocky, broad-shouldered humanoid figure stands at center in a boxing-like guarded stance, arms raised close to the body. The figure has visibly blue-tinted skin and a bald or close-cropped head, wearing a long purple coat with high collar. The background is filled with crackling magenta and dark energy discharges radiating outward. The overall composition is a mid-shot centered portrait. The energy surrounding the figure suggests immense restrained power. Expression is unreadable, face largely in shadow.
foreground: broad-shouldered humanoid in purple long coat, arms raised in guarded fighting stance, blue-tinted skin
background: crackling magenta and dark energy discharges
